description: After a vessel departs, an analyst needs to create a performance report for the shipping line, detailing the productivity achieved during its port call.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all key timestamps for the vessel's visit (e.g., arrival, first line, operations start, operations end, departure).

expected_outcome.value: Analyst pulls the complete event timeline for the vessel from the TOS.

nodes.task_description: Calculate key performance indicators (KPIs) such as crane intensity, gross crane productivity (GCP), and berth productivity.

expected_outcome.value: All standard KPIs are accurately calculated.

nodes.task_description: Generate a summary report and send it to the shipping line.

expected_outcome.value: A standardized performance report is created and emailed to the customer.
